title: 20 Totally not a hentai question
wikitext:
[]: 2.0: Totally not a hentai question [SPOILERS] Post by arkiel » Fri Jul 17, 2009 5:35 pm Okay, so, following the giant rainbow angel with abstract dancers for frill, we get this: then this (looks much better in motion) and after she goes to sleep with Shinji, this happens: So... the closeup shot is almost -almost- kinda... wrong. All by itself. But I sort of picked up -via cinematography- that Asuka gets a period during the movie. Whether it is her first or not I don't know, but if she's squirming about because her feeling of inadequacy is being made even more difficult by the city lights AND the onset of a period, I guess I don't have to consider whoever directed that scene a total slimeball. So, question for people with more of a talent for Japanese than I: anything she says, during that scene or after, indicate that her period is coming on?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 17, 2009 5:47 pm Er...No, she was saying something in the night-time scene before going to Shinji's room about how it's only natural she's alone (and that she hates it, I think). Something like that at least.

[]: Post by Holy Diver » Fri Jul 17, 2009 5:56 pm I don't know if that would be her first period, considering that she is 14 by the time she is introduced. But, I have little knowledge in that area.

[]: Post by arkiel » Fri Jul 17, 2009 6:26 pm I'm applying the same logic here, based on the original series and ol' cinematic emphasis: Though she doesn't shift her legs in this one. Maybe in 2.11 or 2.22 or whatever they'll call the BluRei To immediately: This then goes to a scene between Misato and Kaji, which Asuka interrupts asking, I imagine, for Misato to stop and get some kotex. And then, Asuka does a flip. They could totally make a commercial out of this.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 17, 2009 6:28 pm I'm sure AMV hell will do that. In that scene where Asuka calls Misato, Asuka was saying something about Eva-03, I can't remember what exactly though.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 6:43 pm arkiel wrote:

[]: Re: 2.0: Totally not a hentai question [SPOILERS] Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:12 pm arkiel wrote: Whether it is her first or not I don't know, but if she's squirming about because her feeling of inadequacy is being made even more difficult by the city lights AND the onset of a period, I guess I don't have to consider whoever directed that scene a total slimeball.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:16 pm ...This IS Anno you're talking about and Asuka IS his favorite...

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:19 pm yeah, I mean people in Japan LOOOOOOOOOOOVE panties, they had previously worn panties "from schoolgirls" sold in vending machines up until recently

[]: Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:25 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: yeah, I mean people in Japan LOOOOOOOOOOOVE panties, they had previously worn panties "from schoolgirls" sold in vending machines up until recently

[]: Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 17, 2009 10:41 pm I didn't get any impression that Asuka was supposed to be on her period.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 10:47 pm I agree, I don't exactly see such "evidence" either, but maybe that'll change when I see 2.0 with reasonable picture quality

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 17, 2009 10:49 pm I didn't get that impression at all, especially considering the dialogue I mentioned in the scenes.

[]: Post by Soul Fire » Fri Jul 17, 2009 10:51 pm Other than a single closeup of her panties what exactly is there indiacting she is on her period. Isnt this reading a bit too much in to the scenery here.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:00 pm ^yeah, but so what? we're all pervs here, you know?

[]: Post by arkiel » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:10 pm Soul Fire wrote: Other than a single closeup of her panties what exactly is there indiacting she is on her period. Isnt this reading a bit too much in to the scenery here.

[]: Post by Eva 04 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:55 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: ^yeah, but so what? we're all pervs here, you know?

[]: Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat Jul 18, 2009 8:30 am Leg-shifting has nothing to do with having a period, at all. And where's the hentai? This is mild stuff, so mild that I wonder why they even put it in.

[]: Post by Soul Fire » Sat Jul 18, 2009 10:54 am cinematic focus on that area could certainly be explained if she was on her period

[]: Post by Axell » Sat Jul 18, 2009 11:40 am well in NGE we have confirmation that shes having her period and she acts nothing like this, so i'd say no
